asset_name: Duel HUD Bars and Round Panel — player HP, enemy HP, cost pips, deck count, round label
shared_properties: The HUD uses deep navy panels, gold trim, and bright status fills that match the academy fantasy theme.
Readability target is one glance recognition for HP, cost, round, and deck count while combat is in motion.
Panel art must leave the center of the screen clear for projectile tracking.
differences: This task covers persistent battle HUD components.
Timing windows, hand cards, and reward choice panels remain in other UI files.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Moodboard for gold-trimmed fantasy UI panels that sit above a warm dark environment.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_player_silhouette
reference_images.purpose: Player silhouette board for preserving top and bottom combat readability around the HUD margins.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load assets/art/reflect_academy/trial_2/ui_duel_hud_bars_round_panel.png during DuelLoading and cache the atlas under ui_duel_hud_bars_round_panel.
runtime_notes: Provide atlas parts for enemy_hp_panel, player_hp_panel, cost_pip_strip, deck_counter, round_badge, and three damage-threshold variants.
Render this sheet through the overlay UI camera so it does not inherit world shake during small impacts.
Keep safe margins at least 24px from each screen edge for platform-independent presentation.

context.usage: Persistent duel HUD showing both combatants, round state, current cost, and remaining deck size.

layout_notes: Enemy HP panel anchors top-right and player HP panel anchors mid-right.
Round badge centers on the top bar while cost pips and deck counter sit along the bottom HUD band.
Numbers are reserved as runtime text overlays inside pre-drawn panel bounds.

shape.silhouette: Gold-edged fantasy HUD bars and plaques with beveled navy interiors.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 1920x240px with eight 480x120 frames and no padding.
Gold trim and status fills remain readable over the academy backdrop and during projectile flashes.
Panel interiors leave enough empty space for runtime text without clipping the decorative frame.
Enemy and player status groups remain distinguishable by placement and color at first glance.
